rationale: The proposed change concerns the residence homestead exemption amount under Tax Code §11.13(b). Elec. Code §275.002 governs majority-vote requirements for city office elections. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and do not conflict.
quote: To be elected to a city office, a candidate must receive a majority of the total number of votes received by all candidates for the office.
_note: No conflict between a property tax exemption increase and a municipal election vote requirement.
